Additionally, on April 3, 2025, the company expanded its Special Committee of the Board of Directors by adding a third independent director, Jack Steenstra, indicating a move towards strengthening governance.

data.title: FIGS Appoints Jerry Jao as Independent Director
data.description:
FIGS ( (FIGS) ) has issued an update.

On April 1, 2025, FIGS, Inc., a leading healthcare apparel brand, appointed Jerry Jao as an independent director to its board, also naming him Chair of the Audit Committee and a member of the Compensation Committee. Jao, with extensive experience in marketing, technology, and finance, is expected to contribute valuable insights to accelerate FIGS’ growth and enhance its board’s functionality, particularly in digital marketing and AI solutions.

More about FIGS

FIGS is a founder-led, direct-to-consumer healthcare apparel and lifestyle brand that aims to celebrate, empower, and serve healthcare professionals. The company creates technically advanced apparel combining comfort, durability, function, and style, and serves healthcare professionals across North America, Europe, the Asia Pacific region, and the Middle East.

data.title: Sunrise Shares Updates on Loan Disbursement Progress
data.description:
Sunrise Shares Holdings Ltd ( (SG:581) ) just unveiled an update.

Sunrise Shares Holdings Ltd., a company incorporated in Singapore, announced an update on its recent loan agreements. The company has successfully received a S$1.5 million loan from Mr. Xue Jie, while the disbursement period for the remaining S$3.5 million from Mr. Huang and Cybersec Technology has been extended to 19 April 2025. This extension is intended to facilitate the completion of necessary fund arrangements. The company assures that all other terms of the loan agreements remain unchanged and advises shareholders and potential investors to exercise caution when trading shares.

data.title: Harmony Biosciences Appoints Ron Philip to Board
data.description:
Harmony Biosciences Holdings ( (HRMY) ) has shared an update.

On April 2, 2025, Harmony Biosciences appointed Ron Philip to its Board of Directors, filling a vacancy left by Jack Bech Nielsen’s resignation in June 2024. Philip, who brings extensive experience from his roles at Orbital Therapeutics and Spark Therapeutics, will serve on the Audit and Nominating and Corporate Governance Committees. His appointment is expected to support Harmony’s growth and pipeline expansion, aligning with the company’s focus on innovative therapies for rare neurological diseases.

More about Harmony Biosciences Holdings

Harmony Biosciences is a pharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing innovative therapies for patients with rare neurological diseases. Established in 2017 by Paragon Biosciences, LLC, and headquartered in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania, the company is committed to addressing unmet medical needs through novel science and visionary thinking.

data.title: Puma Alpha VCT Announces New Share Allotment
data.description:
Puma Alpha VCT Plc ( (GB:PUAL) ) has issued an update.

Puma Alpha VCT plc has announced a new allotment of 925,136 ordinary shares as part of its ongoing offer for subscription, aiming to raise up to £15 million, with an additional over-allotment facility of £5 million. The shares were priced between £1.0436 and £1.0866, based on the most recent net asset value per share. This issuance increases the total number of ordinary shares to 32,575,925, which also represents the total voting rights in the company. The new shares are set to be admitted to the London Stock Exchange, with trading expected to commence on or around 4 April 2025.

More about Puma Alpha VCT Plc

data.title: Lifecare ASA Announces General Meeting for Strategic Discussions
data.description:
Lifecare AS ( (DE:LFC0) ) has provided an update.

Lifecare ASA has announced a General Meeting scheduled for April 24, 2025, which will be conducted both physically and digitally. Shareholders are required to register on the Orgbrain portal to participate and vote. This meeting is crucial for stakeholders as it may impact the company’s operations and strategic direction, particularly in advancing their CGM systems in the medical sensor industry.

More about Lifecare AS

Lifecare ASA is a medical sensor company focused on developing technology for sensing and monitoring various body analytes. Their primary product is the Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) system, utilizing osmotic pressure as a sensing principle. The company’s sensor technology, known as ‘Sencell,’ is designed for identifying and monitoring a wide range of analytes and molecules in both humans and pets.

data.title: 7C Solarparken AG Initiates Share Buyback Program
data.description:
7C Solarparken ( (DE:HRPK) ) has issued an update.

7C Solarparken AG has announced a share repurchase program, intending to buy back up to 4,545,454 shares at a maximum price of EUR 2.20 per share, with a total expenditure not exceeding EUR 10 million. This strategic move, approved by the supervisory board, aims to optimize the company’s capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value, with the flexibility to adjust or terminate the program as needed.

More about 7C Solarparken

7C Solarparken AG operates in the renewable energy sector, focusing primarily on the development and management of solar power plants. The company is involved in the production and distribution of solar energy, catering to the growing demand for sustainable energy solutions.
